sql_queries.title: Total Orders in Germany
sql_queries.description: Total number of orders placed from Germany
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(OrderID) FROM Orders WHERE ShipCountry = 'Germany';

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue from Germany
sql_queries.description: Overall revenue generated from German orders
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(T2.UnitPrice * T2.Quantity * (1 - T2.Discount)) FROM Orders AS T1 INNER JOIN "Order Details" AS T2 ON T1.OrderID = T2.OrderID WHERE T1.ShipCountry = 'Germany';

sql_queries.title: Monthly Revenue Trend (Germany)
sql_queries.description: Monthly revenue trend for orders shipped to Germany
sql_queries.sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y-%m', T1.OrderDate) AS OrderMonth, SUM(T2.UnitPrice * T2.Quantity * (1 - T2.Discount)) AS MonthlyRevenue FROM Orders AS T1 INNER JOIN "Order Details" AS T2 ON T1.OrderID = T2.OrderID WHERE T1.ShipCountry = 'Germany' GROUP BY OrderMonth ORDER BY OrderMonth;

sql_queries.title: Top Products by Sales (Germany)
sql_queries.description: Top selling products in Germany by revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT T3.ProductName, SUM(T2.UnitPrice * T2.Quantity * (1 - T2.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Orders AS T1 INNER JOIN "Order Details" AS T2 ON T1.OrderID = T2.OrderID INNER JOIN Products AS T3 ON T2.ProductID = T3.ProductID WHERE T1.ShipCountry = 'Germany' GROUP BY T3.ProductName ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC LIMIT 10;

sql_queries.title: Top Customers in Germany
sql_queries.description: Customers with the highest order value from Germany
sql_queries.sql: SELECT T3.CompanyName, T3.ContactName, SUM(T2.UnitPrice * T2.Quantity * (1 - T2.Discount)) AS TotalOrderValue FROM Orders AS T1 INNER JOIN "Order Details" AS T2 ON T1.OrderID = T2.OrderID INNER JOIN Customers AS T3 ON T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID WHERE T1.ShipCountry = 'Germany' GROUP BY T3.CustomerID, T3.CompanyName, T3.ContactName ORDER BY TotalOrderValue DESC LIMIT 10;

sql_queries.title: Orders by Ship City (Germany)
sql_queries.description: Distribution of orders across different cities in Germany
sql_queries.sql: SELECT ShipCity, COUNT(OrderID) AS NumberOfOrders FROM Orders WHERE ShipCountry = 'Germany' GROUP BY ShipCity ORDER BY NumberOfOrders DESC;
